basicInfo.name: Nightmare Nia
basicInfo.flavor: A wandering magician saw Bolt and helped Nia make further improvements to the robot. A magic gem was embedded in Bolt's chest, making it even stronger.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Shock. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Megavolt
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Shock. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Time Leap
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 115% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Skill Cooldown Increase. [Increased by: 120s]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 115% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Auxiliary Power
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 160% of the caster's Magic Attack. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Round]
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Barrier absorption becomes equal to 160% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Effect: Effect Hit Rate Boost to 40%.

profile.story:
Nia is a confident young genius.
Like Ruri, Nia grew up in an orphanage after losing her parents in the war.
She wasn't always a genius engineer — she used to be an ordinary girl with above-average handiwork, but she suddenly became infused with technical knowledge from the future due to a freak accident caused by a Dimension Keeper.
This knowledge allowed her to create a futuristic rifle for her friend Ruri.
She also used it to create her robot, Bolt.
Soon after Bolt's creation, he quickly became Nia's new best friend. Even though he was a robot that needed no rest, he'd often get bogged down by rain and rust, so Nia worked day and night to make improvements to her new creation.
Unknown to her, though, more changes were developing in her life.
The Dimension Keeper who'd accidentally turned her into a genius decided to own up to their mistake, not by taking away Nia's knowledge, but by disguising themself as a magician and helping her work on Bolt.
They planted a magic gemstone inside of Bolt to increase his power capacity and output.
This led to Bolt becoming quite formidable, to the point he could easily tear through most monsters and even demons. Nia joined the Crusaders at Ruri's suggestion not long after this development.
